Container.Name: grid
Container.Overview:
Grid is a clean, secure, and lightning-fast Kanban board application built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - High performance and tiny resource footprint. - Dynamic theme options based on the 6 Super Metroid locations (Crateria, Brinstar, Norfair, Wrecked Ship, Maridia, Tourian). - Multilingual interface support. - Optional access PIN encryption for privacy.
Container.Requires: If you lock the application with a PIN, it is recommended to set a strong PIN and back up your data directory. Note: The container runs as nobody:users (UID 99 / GID 100) out of the box. Ensure the mapped host appdata folder has read/write permissions for UID 99 / GID 100.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4405).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the grid interface (leave empty for public mode).

Config.Name: Max Connection Attempts
Config.Description: Number of failed PIN attempts permitted before locking out the user client IP address.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in the navigation header or browser tab.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Application base URL. Highly recommended to set if using a reverse proxy to ensure redirect and socket links are generated correctly.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP request origins (CORS filter). Use '*' to allow all origins.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Host User ID for container process owner.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Host Group ID for container process owner.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for project database files.

Config.Name: Enable Translation Selector
Config.Description: Enable the multi-language / translation selector in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to false.

Config.Name: Enable Themes Toggle
Config.Description: Enable the Super Metroid theme selector in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to true.

Config.Name: Enable Print Button
Config.Description: Enable the print button in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to false.
